nasb.text: No man will be able to stand before you; the Lord your God will lay the dread of you and the fear of you on all the land on which you set foot, as He has spoken to you.

esv.text: No one shall be able to stand against you. The Lord your God will lay the fear of you and the dread of you on all the land that you shall tread, as he promised you.

cnv.text: 必沒有一人能在你們面前站立得住；耶和華你們的　神，必照著他對你們所說的，使害怕和驚懼你們的心臨到你們將要踏足之地的居民。

ccb.text: 所到之处无人能抵挡你们，因为你们的上帝耶和华会使那些地方的人对你们充满惧怕，正如祂对你们的应许。
